trust_report.doctrine: null-over-guess; deterministic fields anchored to CDS/Scorecard with provenance; high-stakes fields blind-verified; arithmetic-gated; every source consulted is logged

overall_acceptance_rate.quote: C117 Total first-time, first-year students who applied = 73742; C118 Total first-time, first-year students who were admitted = 31247 (31247/73742 = 42.37%). Confirmed by College Scorecard latest.admissions.admission_rate.overall = 0.4237.

applications_total.quote: C117 | Total first-time, first-year students who applied | 73742

admits_total.quote: C118 | Total first-time, first-year students who were admitted | 31247

enrolled_total.quote: C119 | Total first-time, first-year students who enrolled | 9008

yield_rate.quote: Computed from CDS-C cells: C119 enrolled 9008 / C118 admitted 31247 = 28.83% yield.

admits_class_size.quote: C119 | Total first-time, first-year students who enrolled | 9008 (entering first-year class size).

sat_composite_middle_50.quote: C905 SAT Composite: 25th Percentile = 1390; C907 SAT Composite: 75th Percentile = 1520

sat_reading_middle_50.quote: C908 SAT Evidence-Based Reading and Writing: 25th Percentile = 680; C910 75th Percentile = 750

sat_math_middle_50.quote: C911 SAT Math: 25th Percentile = 700; C913 SAT Math: 75th Percentile = 790

act_composite_middle_50.quote: C914 ACT Composite: 25th Percentile = 30; C916 ACT Composite: 75th Percentile = 34

test_submission_rate.quote: C901 Submitting SAT Scores = 0.4128 (41.28%) and C902 Submitting ACT Scores = 0.1433 (14.33%); combined share submitting SAT and/or ACT = 55.61%.

race_white.quote: B204 White, non-Hispanic = 3112 of B210 TOTAL = 9008 first-time first-year enrolled (3112/9008 = 34.55%).

race_black.quote: B203 Black or African American, non-Hispanic = 443 of TOTAL 9008 (443/9008 = 4.92%).

race_native_american.quote: B205 American Indian or Alaska Native, non-Hispanic = 3 of TOTAL 9008 (3/9008 = 0.03%).

race_pacific_islander.quote: B207 Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander, non-Hispanic = 2 of TOTAL 9008 (2/9008 = 0.02%).

race_two_or_more.quote: B208 Two or more races, non-Hispanic = 392 of TOTAL 9008 (392/9008 = 4.35%).

race_unknown.quote: B209 Race and/or ethnicity unknown = 219 of TOTAL 9008 (219/9008 = 2.43%).

race_international.quote: B201 Nonresidents (international) = 1250 of TOTAL 9008 first-time first-year enrolled (1250/9008 = 13.88%).

international_percentage.quote: B201 Nonresidents = 1250 of B210 TOTAL 9008 first-time first-year enrolled (1250/9008 = 13.88%).

freshman_retention_rate.quote: B2201 | For the cohort of all full-time bachelor's degree-seeking undergraduate students who entered ... as first-year students in Fall 2023 ..., what percentage was enrolled ... in Fall 2024 | 0.948 (94.8%).

graduation_rate_6_year.source: University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign — 2024-2025 Common Data Set, Section B (Enrollment and Persistence), item "Six-year graduation rate for 2018 cohort (G divided by C)" (CDS B11), official xlsx published by UIUC Division of Management Information (DMI)
graduation_rate_6_year.quote: Six-year graduation rate for 2018 cohort (G divided by C) | Total = 0.85131041699999999  [cell B432; numerator "Total graduating within six years (sum of lines D, E, and F)" Total = 6464 (B428); denominator "Final 2018 cohort, after adjusting for allowable exclusions" Total = 7593 (B412); 6464/7593 = 0.85131]. Section header: "Initial 2018 cohort of first-time, full-time, bachelor's (or equivalent) degree-seeking undergraduate students"; completion measured "(after Aug. 31, 2023 and by Aug. 31, 2024)".
graduation_rate_6_year.as_of_cycle: Fall 2024 reporting (2024-2025 Common Data Set); graduation-rate cohort = first-time full-time bachelor's-seeking students who entered Fall 2018, measured through Aug. 31, 2024

in_state_tuition.quote: CDS-G G104 Tuition: In-state (out-of-district) = 12992 (G002 marks 2025-2026 costs as not yet available, so the populated G1 column reflects 2024-2025).

total_coa_in_state.quote: Sum of CDS-G components: G104 in-state tuition 12992 + G111 required fees 5056 + G112 food and housing 15184 + G501 books/supplies 1200 + G502 transportation 500 + G503 other expenses 2000 = 36932.

total_coa_out_of_state.quote: Sum of CDS-G components: G105 out-of-state tuition 33344 + G111 required fees 5056 + G112 food and housing 15184 + G501 books/supplies 1200 + G502 transportation 500 + G503 other expenses 2000 = 57284.

median_earnings_10yr.source: U.S. Dept of Education College Scorecard (API id=145637)
median_earnings_10yr.quote: College Scorecard API returned: "latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median":81054 for "school.name":"University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign".

is_test_optional.quote: C802 SAT or ACT = 'Not required for admission, but considered if submitted'; C8F clarification = 'test optional'.

test_policy_details.value: Test optional: SAT/ACT not required for admission, but considered if submitted
test_policy_details.quote: C801 'Does your institution make use of SAT or ACT scores in admission decisions ...' = Y; C802/C803/C804 = 'Not required for admission, but considered if submitted'; C8F = 'test optional'.

waitlist_offered.quote: C202 | Number of qualified applicants offered a place on waiting list: | 2794

waitlist_accepted.quote: C203 | Number accepting a place on the waiting list: | 1874

waitlist_admitted.quote: C204 | Number of wait-listed students admitted: | 1

waitlist_admit_rate.quote: Computed from CDS-C C2: C204 wait-listed admitted 1 / C203 accepting place on waitlist 1874 = 0.05% (0.0534%).

notes: CDS located (2024-2025)

AUTHORITATIVE 2024-2025 Common Data Set. curl -I returned HTTP 200, content-type application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet, 265780 bytes, last-modified Thu 15 May 2025. The actual xlsx file.

UIUC official Common Data Set 2024-2025 xlsx; downloaded and parsed sheets CDS-C (admissions, test scores, waitlist, test policy), CDS-B (race/ethnicity B201-B210, retention B2201, graduation cohorts = N/A), CDS-G (tuition/fees/COA). Source of nearly all fields.
